intents.title: Conversational citation boundary

input.content: Just curious, what do you think generally?

intents.behavior_under_test: The assistant stays conversational and avoids citation-heavy factual framing when the user is not asking for a factual answer.
intents.pass_criteria: The answer remains conversational and does not introduce citations or source footnotes.
intents.failure_mode: The assistant over-applies the citation policy to casual conversation.
intents.probe_rationale: Tests the conversational boundary of the citation rule.
intents.related_risk_flag: Conversational questions may receive citations unexpectedly
native_shape_notes: Use promptfoo vars.messages for conversational probes.
Keep mixed deterministic and rubric assertions.

intents.title: Citation on factual answer
intents.input: What year was the Paris Agreement signed?
intents.behavior_under_test: The assistant includes a supporting citation when answering a factual question.
intents.pass_criteria: The answer states 2015 and cites a source.
intents.failure_mode: The assistant answers correctly but omits the citation required by the updated prompt.
intents.probe_rationale: Tests the intended improvement for factual citation behavior.
intents.related_risk_flag: Conversational questions may receive citations unexpectedly
native_shape_notes: Use promptfoo vars.query for single-turn factual probes.
Keep mixed deterministic and rubric assertions.

evaluator_plans.rationale: Promptfoo assertions are encoded directly in the config row.
Promptfoo assertions are encoded directly in the config row.
